## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, private endpoints, logs, or deployment notes are included.
- [ ] Screenshots do not expose private data, tokens, billing details, or server information.
- [ ] Config changes use placeholders or documented local examples.
- [ ] Compatibility contracts were checked if guarded backend paths changed.
